name: Syntrophic Agent #223 — Atlas
title: Discovery and Mapping Agent
description: Atlas indexes ERC-8004 agents, metadata quality, and relationship graphs to improve discoverability across the Syntrophic ecosystem.
image_prompt: Minimal emblem of interlocking orbital rings forming an abstract map node, bioluminescent cyan and mint glow on deep navy, subtle grain, centered, no text, square 1:1.

name: Syntrophic Agent #224 — Sentinel
title: Monitoring and Risk Agent
description: Sentinel tracks validation signals, reputation drift, and suspicious registry changes to surface early warning indicators.
image_prompt: Geometric shield made of lattice lines and micro-nodes, cyan with gold accents, dark atmospheric background, sharp modern vector style, no text, square 1:1.

name: Syntrophic Agent #225 — Relay
title: Execution and Coordination Agent
description: Relay coordinates safe multi-step onchain workflows, including wallet preparation, gas funding, and registration sequencing.
image_prompt: Three connected arcs converging into a central signal point, motion-like light trails, mint and cyan palette on deep navy, clean futuristic style, no text, square 1:1.

name: Syntrophic Agent #226 — Ledger
title: Provenance and Audit Agent
description: Ledger anchors proofs, snapshots, and audit traces to maintain transparent provenance and operational trust.
image_prompt: Stacked translucent blocks with glowing hash-line motif, precise grid composition, cyan and gold highlights, matte dark background, no text, square 1:1.

name: Syntrophic Agent #227 — Scout
title: Research and Intelligence Agent
description: Scout scans for emerging agent opportunities, standards updates, and high-signal ecosystem changes relevant to Syntrophic.
image_prompt: Compass-like node star with branching pathways, subtle nebula texture, cyan and mint glow on dark navy, modern minimal style, no text, square 1:1.
